data.title: Iran Dismisses Trump's Nuclear Negotiation Proposal, Accuses US of Coercion
data.description: Iran's Supreme Leader has categorically rejected a peace negotiation proposal from President Trump, accusing the US of attempting to "bully" Iran into compliance.

data.title: Jim Cramer Asks, 'Do We Just Keep Selling Because Everyone Is Selling?'—Calls It The 'Every Day Lower Prices Walmart White House'
Mark Cuban Reveals the Thing He Respects Most About Elon Musk: 'What He's Been Able To Accomplish Is Insane, It's Incredible'
data.description: Last fall, Mark Cuban expressed his admiration for Elon Musk's business acumen and risk-taking approach, despite their ideological differences.

data.title: Trump Organization Sues Capital One Over Alleged Political Bias in Account Closures, Eric Trump Leads Charge
data.description: The Trump Organization has launched a lawsuit against Capital One, alleging that the bank closed hundreds of Trump-linked accounts for politically motivated reasons.

data.title: Elon Musk's xAI Expands, Apple Delays Siri, Meta's AI Assistant May Get Paid Subscriptions, And More: This Week In AI
data.description: Whirlwind of tech activity with AI in focus: Elon Musk's xAI expands, Apple delays Siri upgrade, Meta may add subscriptions & ads, Palantir delivers AI-powered battle stations, Ex-Google CEO warns against global race for superintelligent AI.
